testcase.name: testTimesheetsFlow
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //span[contains(text(),'Timesheets')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.80, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.153 (85fd829a1b2..., userDataDir: C:\Users\AIP-28~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50140}, goog:processID: 16768, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50140/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.80, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4bbab05b2cf8deb104f4b19ad2b2ed5b at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.aipxperts.punchly.pages.TimesheetsPage.openTimesheets(TimesheetsPage.java:39) at com.aipxperts.punchly.tests.TimesheetsTest.testTimesheetsFlow(TimesheetsTest.java:28) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ...
